content.introduction: Bitcoin is predicted to trade between $75,000 and $85,000 in May, with the 200-day moving average at $82,228 as a key factor. However, a bullish trend could push it above this resistance.
body: Bitcoin hasn't closed above its 200-day moving average at $82,228 in seven months. Clearing it in May would be the first real trend reversal
